bundleManifestText: TECHNICAL PREVIEW — Manual cross-platform and assistive-technology QA is deferred; browser and assistive-technology compatibility is not validated. Manual browser, print-engine, operating-system, and assistive-technology observations are deferred. This bundle does not claim compatibility authorization against the validated-release support matrix. It contains two alternative counsel-review editions of the AA11393US claims-to-specification navigator: the NA edition (claim set NA-2026-07-21-v2) and the AF edition (claim set AF-2026-07-17-v2). Each edition presents one candidate claim strategy for counsel review. Inclusion of both editions expresses no comparison, preference, or filing recommendation.
